description_long: This filing cabinet features a robust, rectangular structure with a two-tone exterior: a brown upper section and a darker, stone-textured lower section. The top portion appears to be made of wood or a wood-like laminate, while the middle section is a dense, dark material, possibly metal or composite, and the base has a granite or stone finish. The front face is flat and unadorned, with a subtle horizontal gap at the top suggesting the presence of a drawer or compartment. The side views reveal a layered construction, with visible seams and a slight overhang of the upper section. There are no visible handles, label holders, or locks, giving the cabinet a minimalist, modern appearance. The overall build suggests durability and suitability for high-traffic urban environments such as offices or public spaces.
description: A modern, two-tone filing cabinet with a wood-like upper section, dark composite middle, and stone-textured base, featuring a minimalist, handle-free design.
description_view_0: Front view showing a flat, brown upper section with a subtle horizontal gap at the top and a darker, stone-textured base.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the layered construction and the overhang of the upper section over the darker middle and stone-textured base.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the full width of the brown upper section, the dark middle, and the stone-textured base, with no visible openings or handles.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the layered materials and the overhang of the upper section.
